items.title_en: 2.6 million student loan borrowers fell into default in early 2026: New York Fed
items.title_zh: 纽约联储：2026 年初有 260 万学生贷款借款人违约
items.desc_en: Student loan defaults are showing up on consumers' credit reports for the first time since the Covid pandemic, a new blog by the New York Fed shows.
items.desc_zh: 纽约联储的一篇新博客显示，自新冠疫情大流行以来，学生贷款违约首次出现在消费者的信用报告中。

items.title_en: Zelensky's ex-chief of staff in court as Ukraine corruption probe escalates
items.title_zh: 乌克兰腐败调查升级，泽伦斯基前幕僚长出庭
items.desc_en: Andriy Yermak was named by Ukraine's two anti-corruption agencies as a suspect in a money-laundering scheme.
items.desc_zh: 安德烈·叶尔马克 (Andriy Yermak) 被乌克兰两个反腐败机构列为洗钱计划的嫌疑人。

items.title_en: Qualcomm drops 13% as chip stocks pull back from record AI-driven rally
items.title_zh: 芯片股从人工智能驱动的创纪录涨势中回落，高通股价下跌 13%
items.desc_en: The recent rally has shown a broadening of the AI trade beyond chipmaking giant Nvidia.
items.desc_zh: 最近的上涨表明人工智能贸易正在扩大到芯片制造巨头英伟达之外。

items.title_en: After Circle's ARC token reveal, even cautious analysts are hiking price targets for the stablecoin stock
items.title_zh: Circle 的 ARC 代币披露后，即使是谨慎的分析师也提高了该稳定币股票的价格目标
items.desc_en: ARC will be the native token of Circle's homegrown Arc blockchain, which is designed for AI-driven financial activity.
items.desc_zh: ARC 将成为 Circle 自主研发的 Arc 区块链的原生代币，该区块链专为人工智能驱动的金融活动而设计。

items.title_en: Dali ship operator charged over deadly  Baltimore bridge collapse
items.title_zh: 大理船舶运营商因巴尔的摩大桥倒塌事故被指控
items.desc_en: Six construction workers were killed and several vehicles plunged into the river after the cargo ship crashed into the bridge.
items.desc_zh: 货船撞桥后，六名建筑工人死亡，多辆车辆坠入河中。

items.title_en: The summer box office is off to a hot start as weekend ticket sales top $160 million
items.title_zh: 夏季票房开局火爆，周末票房突破1.6亿美元
items.desc_en: The summer box office is off to a sizzling start, thanks in part to strong week-after-week performance from returning titles.
items.desc_zh: 夏季票房开局火爆，这在一定程度上要归功于回归影片一周又一周的强劲表现。

items.title_en: Credit card debt dips to $1.25 trillion — but maintains ‘K-shaped’ pattern, New York Fed research shows
items.title_zh: 纽约联储研究显示，信用卡债务降至 1.25 万亿美元，但仍保持“K 形”格局
items.desc_en: Collectively, Americans owe $1.25 trillion on their credit cards, according to a new report by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York.
items.desc_zh: 根据纽约联邦储备银行的一份新报告，美国人的信用卡欠款总计达 1.25 万亿美元。

items.title_en: OpenAI trial updates: Board chair Taylor continues testimony, Altman set to take stand
items.title_zh: OpenAI 审判更新：董事会主席泰勒继续作证，奥特曼准备出庭作证
items.desc_en: Elon Musk is accusing OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and President Greg Brockman of trying to 'steal a charity.'
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 指责 OpenAI 首席执行官萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 和总裁格雷格·布罗克曼 (Greg Brockman) 试图“窃取慈善机构”。

items.title_zh: 伊朗战争导致能源成本飙升，美国通胀率跃升至3.8%

items.title_en: AI super rally has retail investors acting the most aggressive since trading frenzy during Covid
items.title_zh: 人工智能超级反弹让散户投资者表现出自新冠疫情期间交易狂潮以来最激进的表现
items.desc_en: Retail traders are buying calls in Cboe's "Mag 10" stocks – the big seven plus AMD, Palantir and Broadcom – at the heaviest 10-day clip since 2021, according to a report from the exchange.
items.desc_zh: 根据芝加哥期权交易所的一份报告，散户交易员正在买入芝加哥期权交易所“Mag 10”股票（七大股票加上 AMD、Palantir 和 Broadcom）的看涨期权，这是自 2021 年以来最猛烈的 10 天涨幅。

items.title_en: Bulls and bears both believe this could be 1999 all over again. Embrace it or dump your tech stocks?
items.title_zh: 多头和空头都认为 1999 年可能会重演。拥抱它还是抛售你的科技股？
items.desc_en: We are not guaranteed a close rerun of the 1999-2000 extremes. Just because things got crazier then doesn't mean that's ahead of us.
items.desc_zh: 我们不能保证 1999 年至 2000 年的极端情况会重演。仅仅因为当时事情变得更加疯狂并不意味着我们就这样了。

items.title_zh: 特朗普将带十几名美国高管前往中国。黄仁勋不是其中之一

items.desc_zh: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋不会参加特朗普的中国之行，但其他十几位美国高管却参加了。

items.title_en: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term
items.title_zh: 乌干达总统宣誓就职，创历史第七个任期
items.desc_en: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.
items.desc_zh: 81 岁的约韦里·穆塞韦尼 (Yoweri Museveni) 在 1 月份赢得了有争议的选举，延长了他 40 年的统治。

items.title_en: EBay rejects GameStop's $56 billion takeover bid, calling it 'neither credible nor attractive'
items.title_zh: eBay 拒绝 GameStop 560 亿美元的收购要约，称其“既不可信也不有吸引力”

items.desc_zh: 许多分析师对这笔交易提出质疑，理由是 GameStop 将如何为交易提供资金以及战略理由。

items.title_zh: Hims & Hers 第一季度亏损、盈利指引疲软，股价暴跌 16%

items.desc_zh: Hims & Hers 今年 3 月与诺和诺德 (Novo Nordisk) 达成协议，在其平台上销售其 GLP-1 减肥药物 Wegovy。

items.desc_zh: 她在一次欧盟峰会上表示，专家小组将于 7 月份就如何保护未成年人上网制定措施。

items.title_en: Mexico cancels plans to end school year early for World Cup
items.title_zh: 墨西哥取消为世界杯提前结束学年的计划
items.desc_en: Parents were angry at a proposal to end classes on 5 June instead of 15 July due to the tournament and expected extreme heat.
items.desc_zh: 家长们对因锦标赛而于 6 月 5 日而不是 7 月 15 日结束课程的提议感到愤怒，并且预计会出现极热天气。

items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.title_en: Snack giant switches to black and white packaging as Iran war hits ink supplies
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗战争影响墨水供应，零食巨头转向黑白包装

items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡的有效关闭严重扰乱了全球能源和石化产品的供应。

items.title_en: Pakistan struck a rehab centre and killed 269 Afghans. Their families want to know why
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦袭击了一个康复中心，造成 269 名阿富汗人死亡。他们的家人想知道原因

items.title_en: France seeks to move beyond colonial ties by meeting African leaders in Kenya
items.title_zh: 法国寻求通过在肯尼亚会见非洲领导人来摆脱殖民关系
items.desc_en: In a first since these meetings started in the 1970s, this move reflects a change in France's thinking.
items.desc_zh: 这是自 20 世纪 70 年代召开这些会议以来的第一次，此举反映了法国思维的变化。

items.title_en: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking

items.title_en: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'

items.desc_en: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".
